statics.description: Max speed — You may pay {0} rather than pay the unearth cost of the first unearth ability you activate each turn.

triggers.description: Whenever this creature enters or attacks, target creature card in your graveyard without unearth perpetually gains unearth. The unearth cost is equal to its mana cost.
